ComposeManager.Name: LAMP-Stack
ComposeManager.Overview:
Custom LAMP Stack development server for local WordPress, Drupal, Joomla and general PHP development.
Includes Apache, PHP 8.3, Composer, MariaDB and phpMyAdmin.
Supports multiple sites simultaneously via Apache virtual hosts.
Access your sites via browser at your configured IP address. Access phpMyAdmin at your configured IP address on port 8080.
IMPORTANT: Edit the .env file before starting - set your IP address and database passwords.

Config.Name: AppData Path
Config.Description: Where to store all persistent data. Change to match your UnRAID setup.

Config.Name: Web Server IP
Config.Description: Fixed IP address for the web server on your local network. Must be available on your network. Check your router or Pi-hole before setting this.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your local timezone. Full list at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: MariaDB Root Password
Config.Description: Root password for MariaDB. Required - do not leave blank.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: Name of the default database created on first run.

Config.Name: Database User
Config.Description: Username for the default database user.

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: Password for the default database user. Required - do not leave blank.

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: External HTTP port. Change if port 80 is already in use on your UnRAID server.

Config.Name: HTTPS Port
Config.Description: External HTTPS port. Change if port 443 is already in use on your UnRAID server.

Config.Name: phpMyAdmin Port
Config.Description: Port for phpMyAdmin database management UI. Access at http://YOUR_IP:8080
